title: Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked

seo.title: How to Make Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked — Easy American Recipe
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make authentic Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked. This easy American recipe includes step-by-step instructions, tips, and serving ideas.

seo.imageAlt: Authentic American Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked recipe
seo.imageCaption: Delicious homemade Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked — a beloved American classic

description: This classic American comfort food features tender elbow macaroni smothered in a rich, creamy cheese sauce, then baked to golden perfection with a crispy topping. It is the ultimate crowd-pleaser, perfect for family dinners or potlucks, delivering warmth and flavor in every cheesy bite. Enjoy a truly satisfying and timeless dish that brings joy to any table.

instructions.title: Cook the Macaroni
instructions.text: Preheat your oven to 375F (190C). Cook the elbow macaroni according to package directions until al dente. Drain well and set aside. Do not rinse the pasta.

instructions.title: Prepare the Roux
instructions.text: In a large saucepan or Dutch oven, melt 1/2 cup of butter over medium heat. Once melted, add the flour and whisk continuously for 2 minutes to create a smooth roux. This will cook out the raw flour taste.

instructions.title: Make the Béchamel
instructions.text: Gradually whisk in the warmed milk, a little at a time, ensuring there are no lumps. Continue whisking until the sauce thickens and comes to a gentle simmer, about 5-7 minutes. Keep the heat at medium-low.

instructions.title: Create the Cheese Sauce
instructions.text: Remove the saucepan from the heat. Add 3 cups of shredded sharp cheddar cheese and all of the Gruyere cheese to the béchamel. Stir until the cheese is completely melted and the sauce is smooth and creamy. Season with salt, black pepper, and a pinch of nutmeg if using.

instructions.title: Combine and Transfer
instructions.text: Add the cooked, drained macaroni to the cheese sauce and stir gently until all the pasta is evenly coated. Pour the macaroni and cheese mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish.

instructions.title: Add Topping and Bake
instructions.text: In a small bowl, melt the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter and toss with the panko breadcrumbs until coated. Sprinkle the remaining 1 cup of sharp cheddar cheese over the macaroni, then top with the buttered breadcrumbs. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until bubbly and the topping is golden brown.

tips: For the creamiest sauce, ensure your milk is warm before adding it to the roux. This prevents lumps and helps the sauce come together smoothly.
Experiment with a blend of cheeses beyond just cheddar. Gruyere, Monterey Jack, or even a touch of smoked Gouda can add wonderful depth of flavor.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3-4 days. Reheat gently in the oven or microwave, adding a splash of milk if needed to restore creaminess.
article: Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked is a beloved American Pasta and Noodles dish enjoyed across American. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
